title: NIFTEM Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Assistant Professor Posts
description: National Institute of Food Technology Entrepreneurship and Management (NIFTEM) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Assistant Professor Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation can grab this chance and apply for NIFTEM Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of ...
